---
layout: cv
title: Jorge Cordova's CV
---
# [cite_start]Jorge Cordova [cite: 1]
Computer Science student, Web Developer, and 3D Design enthusiast.

<div id="webaddress">
[cite_start]<a href="mailto:jorgeecordova25@gmail.com">jorgeecordova25@gmail.com</a> [cite: 2]
| [cite_start]<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jorge-cordova-9a74b4188/">My LinkedIn</a> [cite: 2]
| <a href="https://github.com/jorgeecordova25/jorgeecordova25.github.io.git/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>

## Currently

Seeking opportunities to apply Computer Science and Data Science skills in professional environments.

### Specialized in

[cite_start]Web development (HTML/CSS, JavaScript) [cite: 18] [cite_start]and 3D modeling/printing[cite: 10, 12].

### Research interests

[cite_start]Data Science [cite: 6][cite_start], Cyber Security [cite: 7][cite_start], and production workflow optimization[cite: 11].

## Education

[cite_start]`August 2021 - September 2024` [cite: 4]
[cite_start]__Brigham Young University - Idaho__, Rexburg, ID [cite: 4]

- [cite_start]Bachelor's of Science in Computer Science [cite: 4]
- [cite_start]Minor: Data Science [cite: 6]
- [cite_start]GPA: 3.8 [cite: 5]

## Activities & Skills

`2021 - 2024`
[cite_start]Member, *Data Science Society* [cite: 8]

### Technical Skills

- [cite_start]**Programming:** JavaScript, HTML/CSS [cite: 18]
- [cite_start]**Developer Tools:** Git, Docker, TravisCI, Google Cloud Platform [cite: 19]
- [cite_start]**Software:** AutoCAD, Sony Vegas Pro 13, Filmora 11, Ableton Live 12, MATLAB [cite: 17]
- [cite_start]**Languages:** English, Spanish, learning Chinese [cite: 16]

## Projects

### 3D Printing & Design

[cite_start]`2021 - 2023` [cite: 10]
[cite_start]__Plastic Empire__, Piura, Peru [cite: 10]

- [cite_start]Co-founded a 3D printing business, designing solutions with AutoCAD[cite: 12].
- [cite_start]Collaborated with architecture students to deliver 30+ high-quality models[cite: 10].
- [cite_start]Optimized production workflows to reduce turnaround times by 25%[cite: 11].

### Content Creation

[cite_start]`2017 - 2019` [cite: 13]
[cite_start]__Plastic Empire__, Remote [cite: 13]

- [cite_start]Video Editor and Script Developer for 20+ videos[cite: 13, 14].
- [cite_start]Improved viewer retention by 30% through enhanced audio and visual quality[cite: 13].
- [cite_start]Achieved a 25% growth in subscriber count through structured storytelling[cite: 14].

## Experience

[cite_start]`March 2024 - April 2024` [cite: 21]
[cite_start]__Center Square Custodian__, BYU-Idaho [cite: 21]

- [cite_start]Managed inventory and supplies to ensure 100% availability of materials[cite: 21].
- [cite_start]Enhanced operational effectiveness through strong organizational skills[cite: 21].
